## Summary / 概要

## Motivation / モチベーション

<!-- Why now? Why this approach? なぜ今/なぜこの方針か -->

## Scope / スコープ

- In scope / 対象:
- Out of scope / 非対象:

## Validation / 検証

- [ ] `cargo build`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] (If UI changed / UI 変更時) 手元で起動確認

## AI Review Loop / AI レビューループ

- [ ] Gemini scout done (or blocked reason recorded)
- [ ] Codex verifier done (or blocked reason recorded)
